text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: Did you enjoy your time off?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I did! My friend and I shared some Irish tea, and
then we prepared some local dishes from the
region I grew up in. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My colcannon went down a treat! I'd like to make
some for you as well sometime!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm not yet used to cooking, but that's one dish I
can serve with confidence!
choice_data_list: I hope I have a chance to try it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's a promise, then! ♪ You'll have to let me
know what you think of it!
